scope: A SwornAgent operator can start from the newest ten releases, load older releases in ten-record bounded transactions, keep release and slice selections reachable inside the terminal height across resize, and navigate between focused panes with Right/Left or Enter/Esc.

test_results.output_ref: live completion run 2026-07-18 — 5/5 acceptance checks covered
live completion run 2026-07-18 — targeted board, TUI, and CLI integration packages passed
live completion run 2026-07-18 — repository-wide suite passed
live completion run 2026-07-18 — zero undeclared mock boundaries
live completion run 2026-07-18 — PASS with no findings
live first-pass proof-bundle gate 2026-07-18 — PASS, cost_usd 0

reachability.evidence: Root Model.Update/Model.View journeys prove bounded startup, asynchronous ten-record growth, non-overlap and generation-plus-limit rejection, cursor-relative scrolling, resize identity, full-frame height, arrow aliases, focus help/borders, and footer states. Visible normal and constrained frames are byte-checked at screenshots/S01-tui-bounded-navigation/*.txt.

delivered.item: AC-01 — the board-owned CatalogWindow fixes the newest release-name window before topology/status object reads, reports HasOlder, preserves ascending output, defers excluded malformed canonical validation, and shares all ranking, validation, topology election, and status election with complete DiscoverCatalog.
delivered.evidence: internal/board/discovery_test.go:TestDiscoverCatalogWindowBoundsMaterializedReleases and TestDiscoverCatalogWindowDefersExcludedCanonicalValidation; existing cmd/sworn board tests passed in the full suite

delivered.item: AC-02 — newRootModel primes exactly ten newest releases; lowercase o returns immediately, renders loading older, installs twenty records atomically with selection preserved, and becomes a no-op with all releases loaded.

AC-03 — desired depth is monotonic, discovery never overlaps, every result carries generation plus positive limit, smaller/stale results cannot replace visible state, and errors preserve the last good snapshot and requested retry depth.
delivered.evidence: internal/tui/tui_test.go:TestCatalogDepthGrowthNeverOverlapsRefresh, TestCatalogRejectsObsoleteSmallerDepth, TestCatalogDepthErrorRetainsLastGoodAndRetries, and existing refresh recovery tests

delivered.item: AC-04 — releases and rendered board lines use independent cursor-relative windows, every loaded row remains reachable across track boundaries, resize preserves IDs/depth/focus, and every positive terminal height is bounded without panic.

AC-05 — Right/Enter share one asynchronous board-open transition, Left/Esc share one return transition, focus controls accent borders and exact state help, and board o retains the existing ToggleSort path.

divergence.description: Captain mechanical PIN-3 explicitly required three terminal-frame artefacts under screenshots/S01-tui-bounded-navigation/, adding that proof-only path beyond the production touchpoint list.
The planned internal/tui/styles.go touchpoint was unnecessary: the focus-only border-colour helper stays beside root focus state in internal/tui/model.go and changes no pane geometry.
